We need to interpret sentiment: Data shows high confidence for Bitcoin reaching $67,500 in July (65% yes) and above $64k on July 22 (98% yes). Low confidence for Bitcoin reaching $75k in July (3% yes). Ethereum dip to $1500 by Dec 2026: Yes 41% (so less than half think it will dip). Overall seems bullish for Bitcoin near-term, moderate for Ethereum long-term dip chance. So overall sentiment: Bullish (due to strong near-term Bitcoin expectations). Provide reasons with numbers.

Ethereum’s long‑term dip to $1,500 by end‑2026 is seen as less likely at 41% yes."
